_comment: Copy this file to local_paths.json (git-ignored) and fill in the real paths for each machine you run on. Keys ending in _root or _setup may use ~ and may be relative to the repo root. Delete profiles you do not use; add new ones (e.g. a second cluster) freely. See wings/config.py for the resolution order.

local.data_root: <absolute path to your local results/data directory, e.g. /path/to/wings_results>
local.code_root: <absolute path to your local WINGS checkout>

hpc.slurm_partition: <comma-separated GPU partitions for your cluster, e.g. on Aoraki: aoraki_gpu_L40,aoraki_gpu,aoraki_gpu_H100>
